---
title: "Lab Gallery"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
resources:
  - images/memory/**
  - memory.json
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(jsonlite)

files <- list.files(
  "images/memory",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

files <- files[
  grepl(
    "\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif|webp|mp4|mov)$",
    files,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
]

memory <- data.frame(

  year = basename(dirname(files)),

  file = files,

  type = ifelse(
    grepl("\\.(mp4|mov)$", files, ignore.case = TRUE),
    "video",
    "image"
  )

)

memory <- memory[order(memory$year, memory$file), ]

write_json(
  memory,
  "memory.json",
  auto_unbox = TRUE,
  pretty = TRUE
)

```

::: {#memory-wall .memory-wall}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
// ============================================================
//  数据加载
// ============================================================
let allData = [];

fetch("memory.json")
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => {
    allData = data;
    renderWall(data);
  });

// ============================================================
//  渲染交错卡片
// ============================================================
function renderWall(data) {
  const wall = document.getElementById("memory-wall");
  wall.innerHTML = "";
  const years = [...new Set(data.map(d => d.year))].sort().reverse();

  years.forEach(year => {
    const cover = data.find(d => d.year == year);
    const card = document.createElement("div");
    card.className = "memory-card";
    card.dataset.year = year;
    card.dataset.cover = cover.file;
    card.innerHTML = `
      <img src="${cover.file}" loading="lazy">
      <div class="overlay"><span>${year}</span></div>
    `;
    card.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      triggerDoorOpen(this, year);
    });
    wall.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// ============================================================
//  🚪 开门效果（强化光效 + 厚重感）
// ============================================================
function triggerDoorOpen(card, year) {
  if (card.dataset.animating === "true") return;
  card.dataset.animating = "true";

  // 1. 获取卡片位置和尺寸
  const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  const cardW = rect.width;
  const cardH = rect.height;
  const centerX = rect.left + cardW / 2;
  const centerY = rect.top + cardH / 2;

  // 2. 创建门容器
  const doorContainer = document.createElement("div");
  doorContainer.className = "door-container";
  Object.assign(doorContainer.style, {
    position: "fixed",
    left: rect.left + "px",
    top: rect.top + "px",
    width: cardW + "px",
    height: cardH + "px",
    zIndex: "9999",
    perspective: "1400px",
    pointerEvents: "none",
  });
  document.body.appendChild(doorContainer);

  // 3. 获取卡片图片
  const imgSrc = card.querySelector("img").src;

  // 4. 创建左门板
  const leftDoor = document.createElement("div");
  leftDoor.className = "door-panel left-door";
  Object.assign(leftDoor.style, {
    position: "absolute",
    left: "0",
    top: "0",
    width: "50%",
    height: "100%",
    backgroundImage: `url(${imgSrc})`,
    backgroundSize: "200% 100%",
    backgroundPosition: "0% 50%",
    transformOrigin: "left center",
    transform: "rotateY(0deg)",
    borderRadius: "200px 0 0 200px",
    boxShadow: "inset -2px 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
    backfaceVisibility: "hidden",
    transition: "transform 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 0.2, 1)",  // 🔥 延长到1.2s
    willChange: "transform",
  });
  doorContainer.appendChild(leftDoor);

  // 5. 创建右门板
  const rightDoor = document.createElement("div");
  rightDoor.className = "door-panel right-door";
  Object.assign(rightDoor.style, {
    position: "absolute",
    right: "0",
    top: "0",
    width: "50%",
    height: "100%",
    backgroundImage: `url(${imgSrc})`,
    backgroundSize: "200% 100%",
    backgroundPosition: "100% 50%",
    transformOrigin: "right center",
    transform: "rotateY(0deg)",
    borderRadius: "0 200px 200px 0",
    boxShadow: "inset 2px 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
    backfaceVisibility: "hidden",
    transition: "transform 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 0.2, 1)",  // 🔥 延长到1.2s
    willChange: "transform",
  });
  doorContainer.appendChild(rightDoor);

  // 6. 🔥 强化光效：门缝光芒（多层叠加）
  // 6a. 主光柱（从门缝向两侧扩散）
  const glowMain = document.createElement("div");
  glowMain.className = "door-glow-main";
  Object.assign(glowMain.style, {
    position: "absolute",
    left: "50%",
    top: "0",
    width: "0px",
    height: "100%",
    transform: "translateX(-50%)",
    background: "linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(150, 230, 255, 0.9), rgba(255, 255, 255, 1), rgba(150, 230, 255, 0.9), transparent)",
    boxShadow: "0 0 60px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.6), 0 0 120px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3), 0 0 200px rgba(50, 150, 255, 0.15)",
    opacity: "0",
    transition: "opacity 0.3s ease, width 0.8s ease",
    willChange: "opacity, width",
    zIndex: "1",
  });
  doorContainer.appendChild(glowMain);

  // 6b. 左侧光晕（照亮左留白）
  const glowLeft = document.createElement("div");
  glowLeft.className = "door-glow-left";
  Object.assign(glowLeft.style, {
    position: "absolute",
    left: "-80%",
    top: "0",
    width: "80%",
    height: "100%",
    background: "radial-gradient(ellipse at right center, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.1) 50%, transparent 80%)",
    opacity: "0",
    transition: "opacity 0.6s ease 0.4s",
    willChange: "opacity",
    zIndex: "0",
    pointerEvents: "none",
  });
  doorContainer.appendChild(glowLeft);

  // 6c. 右侧光晕（照亮右留白）
  const glowRight = document.createElement("div");
  glowRight.className = "door-glow-right";
  Object.assign(glowRight.style, {
    position: "absolute",
    right: "-80%",
    top: "0",
    width: "80%",
    height: "100%",
    background: "radial-gradient(ellipse at left center, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.1) 50%, transparent 80%)",
    opacity: "0",
    transition: "opacity 0.6s ease 0.4s",
    willChange: "opacity",
    zIndex: "0",
    pointerEvents: "none",
  });
  doorContainer.appendChild(glowRight);

  // 6d. 中心光球（门缝核心光源）
  const glowCenter = document.createElement("div");
  glowCenter.className = "door-glow-center";
  Object.assign(glowCenter.style, {
    position: "absolute",
    left: "50%",
    top: "50%",
    width: "40px",
    height: "40px",
    transform: "translate(-50%, -50%)",
    background: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 255, 255, 1) 0%, rgba(150, 230, 255, 0.8) 30%, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3) 60%, transparent 80%)",
    borderRadius: "50%",
    boxShadow: "0 0 80px rgba(150, 230, 255, 0.8), 0 0 160px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.4)",
    opacity: "0",
    transition: "opacity 0.4s ease 0.2s, transform 1s ease",
    willChange: "opacity, transform",
    zIndex: "2",
  });
  doorContainer.appendChild(glowCenter);

  // 7. 🔥 触发开门动画
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    // 光效渐显
    glowMain.style.opacity = "1";
    glowMain.style.width = "90%";  // 光柱扩散到卡片的60%宽度
    
    glowLeft.style.opacity = "1";
    glowRight.style.opacity = "1";
    glowCenter.style.opacity = "1";
    glowCenter.style.transform = "translate(-50%, -50%) scale(3)";
    
    // 门板打开（角度加大，更有开门感）
    leftDoor.style.transform = "rotateY(-150deg)";
    rightDoor.style.transform = "rotateY(150deg)";
  });

  // 8. 卡片淡出
  card.classList.add("flying-out");

  // 9. 🔥 开门完成后跳转（延长到1.4s，让厚重感充分展现）
  setTimeout(() => {
    doorContainer.remove();
    card.classList.remove("flying-out");
    card.dataset.animating = "false";
    window.location.href = `memory-year.html?year=${year}`;
  }, 700);
}
</script>



<style>
.memory-wall{
max-width:800px;
margin:70px auto;
display:flex;
flex-direction:column;
gap:50px;
}


.memory-card{
width:75%;
position:relative;
display:block;
overflow:hidden;
border-radius:200px;
background:#eee;
aspect-ratio:16/9;
text-decoration:none;
transition:.25s;
}

.memory-card:nth-child(odd){
margin-right:auto;
}

.memory-card:nth-child(even){
margin-left:auto;
}

.memory-card img{
width:100%;
height:100%;
object-fit:cover;
display:block;
}

.overlay{
position:absolute;
inset:0;
display:flex;
justify-content:center;
align-items:flex-start;
padding-top:0.3%;
font-size:44px;
font-weight:600;
letter-spacing:6px;
color:#ffffff;
text-shadow:
0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
background:
rgba(0,0,0,.12);
transition:.25s;
}
.memory-card:hover{
transform:scale(1.08);
}
.memory-card:hover .overlay{
background:rgba(0,0,0,.18);
}

.memory-card.opening{
transform:scale(1.1);
opacity:.65;
transition:.28s ease;
}



/* ===== 开门效果 ===== */
.door-container {
  pointer-events: none;
}

.door-panel {
  pointer-events: none;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}

/* 门板边缘高光（金属质感） */
.left-door::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 3px;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0.5), rgba(255,255,255,0.05));
  border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0;
}

.right-door::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 3px;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0.5), rgba(255,255,255,0.05));
  border-radius: 2px 0 0 2px;
}

/* 门板木质/金属纹理感（微妙的噪点） */
.door-panel::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: 
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, transparent 60%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* 卡片淡出 */
.memory-card.flying-out {
  transform: scale(1.05);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), opacity 0.4s ease;
}

</style>
```
